title: Pescaroli's Riding Accessories
description: Have a way to craft the saddle and no longer depend on luck
body:
# Saddle crafting
![crafting the saddle using 3 leathers in the top 3 slots, on the left and right of the middle row there are lines and on the left and right of the bottom slots there are irons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d184e5bac7740e422e9ec866f921fce5d58edbce.png)
